channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-21
item.description: Researchers used metatranscriptomics to track how bacterial communities in southern Lake Michigan shift along a dissolved organic matter gradient. | Weaning is a critical developmental window when young mammals transition from milk to solid food, and new research shows this dietary shift triggers a profound rewiring of the gut microbiome that shapes immune memory for life. | Previous work had established that the gut microbiome influences epigenetic development in intestinal stem cells during the suckling period.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: Researchers used metatranscriptomics to track how bacterial communities in southern Lake Michigan shift along a dissolved organic matter gradient. | Weaning is a critical developmental window when young mammals transition from milk to solid food, and new research shows this dietary shift triggers a profound rewiring of the gut microbiome that shapes immune memory for life. | Previous work had established that the gut microbiome influences epigenetic development in intestinal stem cells during the suckling period.
